segments.text: That advantage is just way too massive—it was crystal clear from that last match. In this matchup especially, it's huge, you know?
segments.original_text: を拾うのがあまりに大きいということはさっきの試合を見て火を見るより明らかだ このカードにおいては特にでかいですからね

segments.text: Went in on the read but caught with the down throw?
segments.original_text: トロッコ 先見大同士を送っていったが下投げ?

full_text: That advantage is just way too massive—it was crystal clear from that last match. In this matchup especially, it's huge, you know? Went in on the read but caught with the down throw?
